# BP-120 positive: Fiber BodyParser is used as a bare statement.
lang: go
file: BP-120-vulnerable.go
variant: fiber
---
package sample

import "github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"

type Request struct {
	Token string `json:"token"`
}

func create(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	var request Request
	c.BodyParser(&request)
	return c.SendStatus(204)
}
